channel.title: Hugo on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Bill's Blog

item.title: Moving the Blog off GitHub Pages — for Real Security Headers
item.description: Why I moved this Hugo blog from GitHub Pages to Cloudflare Pages: GitHub Pages can't set custom HTTP response headers, so a meta-tag CSP was as far as my security posture could go.

item.title: Self-Hosting a Hugo Blog with a Claude Code Publishing Pipeline
item.description: How I set up a Hugo blog on Debian, automated publishing with Claude Code slash commands, and bridged the gap between two separate Claude memory systems.
